headline: Thermo Fisher Scientific Unveils an Integrated Platform to Advance Scalable Cell Therapy Manufacturing
summary: WALTHAM, Mass., May 04, 2026--Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc., the world leader in serving science, today introduced the Gibco™ CTS™ DynaXS™ Single Use Bioreactor, a purpose-built expansion platform designed to help cell therapy developers scale manufacturing with precise control, flexibility, and regulatory readiness.
